case_title: SKYLINE REALTY, INC. VS. DAVID SMITH et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER THAT SUMMONS BE SERVED BY POSTING ON PREMISES AND MAILING, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SKYLINE REALTY, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 840 CALIFORNIA STREET, #42, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $3,155.41 RENT, $630.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,785.41, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF SKYLINE REALTY, INC.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT SMITH, DAVID ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, DAVID
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, DAVID
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SKYLINE REALTY, INC. COURT TRIAL SET FOR APR-22-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (664.5 CCP) FILED BY PLTFS'S ATTORNEY.
PLAINTIFF'S NOTICE OF UNAVAILABILITY/ABSENCE OF COUNSEL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SKYLINE REALTY, INC.
DECLARATION RE: DAILY RENTAL VALUE $21.60 FILED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SKYLINE REALTY, INC.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SKYLINE REALTY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, DAVID DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SMITH, DAVID

JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK NICOLE OLCOMENDY, REPORTER BELDON YEE. MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF APR-22-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON APR-22-2002 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 604, DAVID BALLATI. NO APPERANCE BY DEFT., SENT FOR PROVE-UP.

REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON APR-22-2002 IN DEPT. 604 - NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. WITNESS SWORN AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED AND WITHDRAWN. JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF SKYLINE REALTY AND AGAINST DEFENDANT DAVID SMITH IN THE SUM OF $3155.42 AND ATTORNEY'S FEES; POSSESSION OF PREMISES; RENTAL AGREEMENT FORFEITED. COUNSEL TO SUBMIT ORDER FOR SIGNATURE. JUDGE DBALLATI. CLERK:BHING. RPTR:ASOLIMAN
